title: Mysql
description: Mysql schema from Asset Graph API

auth_plugin_data.description: Optional plugin-specific data, whose meaning depends on the value of auth_plugin_name. Returned in the initial HandshakePacket.

auth_plugin_name.description: The name of the authentication plugin, returned in the initial HandshakePacket.

capability_flags.description: The set of capability flags the server returned in the initial HandshakePacket. Each entry corresponds to a bit being set in the flags; key names correspond to the #defines in the MySQL docs.

character_set.description: The identifier for the character set the server is using. Returned in the initial HandshakePacket.

connection_id.description: The server's internal identifier for this client's connection, sent in the initial HandshakePacket.

error_code.description: Only set if there is an error returned by the server, for example if the scanner is not on the allowed hosts list.

error_id.description: The friendly name for the error code as defined at https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/error-messages-server.html, or UNKNOWN

error_message.description: Optional string describing the error. Only set if there is an error.

protocol_version.description: 8-bit unsigned integer representing the server's protocol version sent in the initial HandshakePacket from the server.

server_version.description: The specific server version returned in the initial HandshakePacket. Often in the form x.y.z, but not always.

status_flags.description: The set of status flags the server returned in the initial HandshakePacket. Each entry corresponds to a bit being set in the flags; key names correspond to the #defines in the MySQL docs.
